mapper.select: SELECT * FROM payment_record WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_record(order_no, transaction_id, amount_fen, openid, trade_state, notify_raw, verify_result, query_result, notify_count, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{transactionId}, #{amountFen}, #{openid}, #{tradeState}, #{notifyRaw}, #{verifyResult}, #{queryResult}, #{notifyCount}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_record SET notify_count = notify_count + 1, notify_raw = #{notifyRaw}, verify_result = #{verifyResult}, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND deleted = 0
